inline_comments.message:
I believe the error message is pretty clear stating that you are using a project name that is already defined in the same file, you will have to use a different project name for your new definition:
ERROR:jenkins_jobs.parser:Duplicate entry found in '/w/workspace/ci-management-jjb-verify/jjb/so/so-adapters-so-oof-adapter.yaml: 'so-adapters-so-oof-adapter' already defined
